# PERF-029 negative: fan-out via a bounded worker pool using a semaphore
lang: go
file: PERF-029-safe.go
---
package sample

import "fmt"

func FanOut(items []int) {
	sem := make(chan struct{}, 8)
	for _, v := range items {
		sem <- struct{}{}
		go func(x int) {
			fmt.Println(x)
			<-sem
		}(v)
	}
}
